headline: C3.ai's Federal Momentum Builds: Can Government Demand Drive Growth?
summary: AI sees federal momentum as defense and government bookings jump 134% and make up 55% of total bookings, even as the company reports a challenging fiscal Q3.

raw.headline: C3.ai's Federal Momentum Builds: Can Government Demand Drive Growth?
raw.summary: AI sees federal momentum as defense and government bookings jump 134% and make up 55% of total bookings, even as the company reports a challenging fiscal Q3.

headline: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) to Offer its Small Cruise Missile to the U.S. Air Force
summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) is one of the best information technology services stocks to buy now. On February 26, Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) announced that the U.S. Air Force has officially designated its Small Cruise Missile as the AGM-190A. This development marks the formal recognition of Leidos’ Small Cruise Missile as an affordable, adaptable stand-off […]

headline: OpenAI's Altman takes jabs at Anthropic, says government should be more powerful than companies
summary: The startup landed a deal with the Department of Defense hours after Anthropic was blacklisted by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth.

headline: 5 unresolved questions hanging over the Anthropic–Pentagon fracas: 'It's all very puzzling'
summary: Plenty of unknowns remain after Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth designated Anthropic a "Supply-Chain Risk to National Security" on Friday.

headline: Defense experts back Anthropic in letter to Congress, slam DOD for setting 'dangerous precedent'
summary: Former defense and intelligence officials and policy experts are urging Congress to investigate the Pentagon's labeling of Anthropic as a supply chain risk.

headline: Anthropic and the Pentagon are back at the negotiating table, FT reports
summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is reportedly back at the negotiating table with the U.S. Department of Defense after the breakdown of talks on Friday.
